entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) being evaluated for resistance to early leafspot

entities.name: CERCOSPORA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: The foliar pathogen that causes early leafspot in peanuts

entities.name: EARLY LEAFSPOT
entities.description: A disease caused by the fungus Cercospora arachidicola that limits peanut production

entities.name: FIELD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to resist early leafspot under field conditions

entities.name: DETACHED LEAF TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A laboratory method used to evaluate the components of resistance in peanut genotypes

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location of the ICRISAT Center from which the pathogen isolate was obtained

entities.name: INCUBATION PERIOD
entities.description: The time between infection and the appearance of symptoms, used as a measure of resistance

entities.name: SPORULATION
entities.description: The production of spores by the pathogen, used as a measure of resistance

entities.name: LESION DIAMETER
entities.description: The size of the disease spots on the leaf, used as a measure of resistance

entities.name: INFECTION FREQUENCY
entities.description: The rate at which the pathogen successfully infects the host tissue, used as a measure of resistance
